heading: Governing body
label: 20705 Governing body
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)20705(a)36:1906., , §§ 6, 7, .June 1, 1982Pub. L. 97–19296 Stat. 10920705(b)36:1907.The words “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States in which it is incorporated” in 36:1906 and “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States wherein it is incorporated” in 36:1907 are omitted as unnecessary.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)20705(a)36:1906., , §§ 6, 7, .June 1, 1982Pub. L. 97–19296 Stat. 10920705(b)36:1907.The words “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States in which it is incorporated” in 36:1906 and “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States wherein it is incorporated” in 36:1907 are omitted as unnecessary.

children.heading: .—Board of Directors
children.label: a .—Board of Directors
children.text: The board of directors and the responsibilities of the board are as provided in the articles of incorporation.

children.heading: .—Officers
children.label: b .—Officers
children.text: The officers and the election of officers are as provided in the articles of incorporation.
